id.notes: Sequential numbering starting at 1, no gaps

title.notes: Extracted from JSON-LD Product.name. Matches product analysis example exactly.

price.notes: Correctly extracted from DOM via pattern matching (£ symbol). JSON-LD offers were empty as expected. Has £ prefix and proper decimal format.

availability.notes: Correctly detected via DOM text pattern matching. 'Add to Bag' button was present and not disabled.

original_price.notes: Correctly detected strikethrough/compare price (£45.00 > £35.00 sale price). Product was on sale.

currency.notes: Correctly set to GBP (not EUR which site_analysis incorrectly stated). Hardcoded based on .co.uk TLD.

url.notes: Full URL with https scheme. Double-slash from input was correctly normalized.

src_url.notes: Equals url since product was provided as direct URL, not discovered from listing.

location.notes: Inferred from .co.uk TLD. Optional field, correctly populated.

status_code.notes: Hardcoded to 200 for successful page loads. Browser-based scraper cannot get real HTTP status. For blocked pages, correctly uses 403.

scraped_at.notes: Valid ISO-8601 with timezone offset. Timestamp is recent and accurate.

remarks.actual_value: Price extracted from DOM (JSON-LD offers empty)
remarks.notes: Correctly notes that price came from DOM fallback rather than JSON-LD. Useful for debugging.

description.actual_value: Calvin Klein for women. Refined classics for a curated wardrobe. Minimalist essentials in signature silhouettes. Highlights • cotton stretch jersey • fine ribbed texture • scoop neckline • monologo at the centre front Shape & Fit • slim fit • sleeveless Composition & Care 95% cotton 5% elastane machine wash country of origin: Vietnam
description.notes: Complete description extracted from JSON-LD, HTML properly cleaned.

sku.notes: Extracted from JSON-LD Product.sku. Matches product analysis example exactly.

brand.notes: Extracted from JSON-LD Product.brand.name. Uppercase format as provided by site.

images.notes: Absolute URL with https scheme, properly extracted from JSON-LD. Single main image.

color.notes: Extracted from JSON-LD Product.color. Properly reflects the selected variant.

mpn.notes: Extracted from JSON-LD Product.mpn. Matches SKU in this case.

category.notes: Category field not present in output. BreadcrumbList JSON-LD may have been filtered to empty (only 'Home' and 'Calvin Klein' items, which the code excludes). This is a low-severity optional enriched field.

issues.problem: Category field not extracted from BreadcrumbList JSON-LD
issues.details: The BreadcrumbList extraction filters out 'Home' and 'Calvin Klein' items. If the BreadcrumbList only contains these two items, the category will be empty. The intermediate breadcrumb levels (e.g., Women > Tops > Tank Tops) may be missing or the selector may not capture all items.
issues.suggested_fix: Debug by logging the full BreadcrumbList structure. The itemListElement items may have a different structure (e.g., nested 'item' object vs flat 'name'). Consider also extracting from the page URL path as a fallback (e.g., if the product was discovered from /womens/tops/tank-tops/...).

issues.problem: Product dataclass is defined but never used
issues.details: The Product class with to_dict() method is defined but the scrape_product function returns a plain dict. The standard field ordering from to_dict() is not applied to the output. This is cosmetic only and does not affect data correctness.
issues.suggested_fix: Either use the Product dataclass in scrape_product() for consistent field ordering, or remove the unused class to reduce code complexity.

issues.problem: status_code is hardcoded, not from actual HTTP response
issues.details: Browser-based scraper cannot access HTTP status codes. The value is set to 200 for successful loads and 403 for detected blocks. This is a known limitation noted in the product analysis.
issues.suggested_fix: No fix needed — this is a fundamental limitation of browser-based scraping. The current approach (200 for success, 403 for block) is reasonable.

script_checks.notes: Scraper starts without errors, produces valid JSON output, logging to both file and console works, rate limiting delay is applied.

feedback_for_writer.summary: Scraper works correctly for the available sample. All core fields extracted accurately. Only minor issue is the missing category field (optional enriched field). The product dataclass is defined but unused — cosmetic code quality note.

category.issue: BreadcrumbList category extraction returns empty, possibly because all items are filtered out
category.fix: Add debug logging for the raw BreadcrumbList structure. Check if itemListElement items have a different JSON structure. Consider relaxing the filter (keep 'Calvin Klein' but not 'Home') or using URL path segments as fallback.

code_suggestions: Consider using the Product dataclass in scrape_product() for consistent output field ordering
Only 1 sample URL was available in input_urls.json — more URLs would increase confidence in extraction accuracy
